description_long: This is a modern bathroom vanity set featuring a rectangular wooden base cabinet with two large drawers, each equipped with sleek metallic handles. On top of the cabinet sits a rectangular vessel sink in white ceramic, paired with a minimalist wall-mounted faucet. Above the sink, a large wall-mounted mirrored cabinet provides additional storage, with two mirrored doors on the left and a wooden door on the right. The interior of the base cabinet reveals organized plumbing and drawer compartments, suggesting practical storage for bathroom essentials. The wood grain finish gives the set a warm, contemporary look, while the clean lines and neutral colors make it suitable for urban residential or commercial bathrooms. The overall design emphasizes both functionality and modern aesthetics.
description: A modern bathroom vanity set with a wood-grain cabinet, vessel sink, and a large mirrored wall cabinet. Features clean lines, metallic handles, and practical storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the wooden cabinet, the vessel sink, and the thickness of the wall-mounted mirrored cabinet.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full face of the vanity, including the two-drawer cabinet, vessel sink, faucet, and the mirrored wall cabinet with its three doors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the cabinet's depth, the vessel sink's profile, and the alignment of the wall cabinet above.
description_view_3: Rear view with the drawers open, exposing the internal compartments, plumbing, and the back of the mirrored cabinet.
